payload.label: bed
payload.long_description: Partial foreground view of a bed with a beige-gray horizontally striped bedspread and a visible dark wooden footboard along the lower edge; left pillow is partially visible at the top-left and the mattress/top surface is smooth and fabric-covered — the bed is edge-cropped in the image and appears approximately 0.8 m from the camera.
